overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing Aloy running through a snowy mountain landscape. The character passes a large rock formation adorned with glowing purple machine structures before continuing through snow-covered pine forests under a bright winter sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain path near machine-infested rock outcrop

events.description: character passes glowing purple machine structures attached to the rock formation
sky becomes more visible and lighting shifts from diffused to direct sunlight as character moves past the rock

agents.ego_description: Aloy running through deep snow toward and passing a large rock formation with glowing purple machine elements

entered.detail: massive snow-covered boulder with overhang serving as a machine site
luminous purple and pink mechanical components and cables attached to the rock face
tall evergreen trees blanketed in snow lining the mountain path
tall evergreen trees blanketed in snow lining the mountain path

segments.scene_description: Aloy runs through a snowy mountain landscape toward a large rock outcrop adorned with glowing purple machine structures. The sky is partially obscured by clouds and the rock formation, creating diffused lighting. The character passes the luminous structures on the left side of the path as the terrain opens up ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snowy mountain trail through pine forest

agents.ego_description: Aloy continuing to run through the snowy wilderness, moving away from the rock formation into open terrain with distant mountain views

entered.detail: snow-capped mountain peaks visible in the background under blue sky
smaller snow-covered boulders along the right side of the trail

segments.scene_description: Having passed the rock formation, Aloy continues running through an open snowy mountain trail. The sky is now fully visible with bright blue patches and scattered clouds, casting sharp shadows on the snow. Distant snow-capped mountains become visible ahead as the character traverses the winding path through scattered pine trees.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a snowy mountain landscape that transitions from a sheltered, luminous outcrop into a wide, sun-drenched alpine trail. It begins with Aloy running toward a large rock formation adorned with glowing purple machine structures under a diffused, cloudy sky. As the character passes these luminous structures on the left, the terrain opens up and the lighting shifts from soft shadows to bright, direct sunlight. The scene then expands into an open mountain path where the sky reveals vivid blue patches and scattered clouds, casting sharp contrasts across the snow. Finally, the camera follows the winding trail through scattered pine trees as distant snow-capped peaks emerge on the horizon.
